ksa_text: Knowledge of data subject rights fulfillment and management, including rights request intake procedures, response workflows, compliance timelines, documentation standards, and remediation processes for access, deletion, and rectification requests.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-004 (Security and Privacy/Knowledge) scores 0.452 composite (highest: EU AI Act at 0.452) and is edge_case for the Robotics Engineer role. Core role signal: 0 pattern match(es). Seniority is appropriate for this role.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Include consistent with edge_case scope, EU AI Act signal (0.452), and Security and Privacy handling. Decision stands.
